name.ja: <ruby>蒼<rt>そう</rt></ruby><ruby>救<rt>きゅう</rt></ruby>の<ruby>光<rt>こう</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt>みょう</rt></ruby> シャルトル

requirement.en: During your Main Phase that you Special Summoned this card, send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en:
● Until the end of your opponent's next turn, while this card is face-up, neither player can Special Summon Level 8 or lower Effect Monsters in face-up Attack Position.
● Until the end of your opponent's next turn, while this card is face-up, your opponent cannot Set monsters from the hand.

materials.en: "Claymont the Skysavior Advisor" + "Soleil the Skysavior Angel"
